# Q4 dedup by asc ts (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q4 dedup by asc ts.

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | dedup user, dst_host by asc ts | fields user, dst_host, ts | sort asc user, asc ts
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 16). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
